case_title: SQUARE, SANDRA VS CANNELL, J. CARLO DBA CANNELL CAPITAL MANAGEMENT

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO J. CARLO CANNELL CANNELL CAPITAL MGMT RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SQUARE, SANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANNELL, J. CARLO DBA CANNELL CAPITAL MANAGEMENT $622.23 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $642.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT CANNELL, J. CARLO DBA CANNELL CAPITAL MANAGEMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $622.23 FILED BY SQUARE, SANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT CANNELL, J. CARLO DBA CANNELL CAPITAL MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CANNELL, J. CARLO DBA CANNELL CAPITAL MANAGEMENT
